title: Elaphoglossum tectum
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum tectum is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family comprises about 2,600 species of ferns, known as the wood ferns and lady ferns. Within the family Dryopteridaceae, Elaphoglossum tectum is assigned to the genus Elaphoglossum, which includes about 1,000 species of epiphytic ferns. The genus Elaphoglossum is further classified in the order Polypodiales, a group of ferns that are often epiphytic or lithophytic. These classifications help scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this species.
